headline: Should Axon’s New AI-Powered 911 Platform Reshape How Investors View Its Public Safety Moat (AXON)?
summary: Earlier this month, Axon Enterprise used its Axon Week 2026 conference to unveil three new AI-powered public safety tools, Axon Vision, an expanded Axon Assistant, and Axon 911, a cloud-based emergency call infrastructure designed to feed richer data directly into first responders’ workflows. By embedding artificial intelligence directly into emergency call handling and field operations, Axon is aiming to help agencies cut through data overload and make faster, more informed decisions in...
